drl:
rule "R0"
when
    T0(f1 != false, f2 >= -4, $b0_0_0 : f2, $b0_0_1 : f0)
    T0(f2 > 3, f1 != false, $b0_1_0 : f0)
    T1(f0 == -3, f0 not in (-3), $b0_2_0 : f1, $b0_2_1 : f0)

rule "R1"
salience -7
when
    $p1_0 : T1(f0 != -4, $b1_0_0 : f0, $b1_0_1 : f1)
then
    delete($p1_0);
end
rule "R2"

    $p2_0 : T0($b2_0_0 : f0)
then
    insert(new T1($b2_0_0, -1000000007, false));
    insert(new T1($p2_0.getF0(), -1000000007, true));

rule "R3"
when
    $p3_0 : T0(f1 != false, f2 >= -4, $b3_0_0 : f2, $b3_0_1 : f0)
    T0(f2 > 3, f1 != false, $b3_1_0 : f0)
then
    delete($p3_0);
end
rule "R4"
when
    T0(f0 > -1, $b4_0_0 : f0, $b4_0_1 : f2)
then
end
rule "R5"
when
    T0(f1 != false, f2 >= -4, $b5_0_0 : f2, $b5_0_1 : f0)
    T0(f2 > 3, f1 != false, $b5_1_0 : f0)
